Rahu Dasa, Jupiter Bhukti, Sun Antara. Rahu, the major

Concerning the Sixth House 271
Lagna and Saturn lord of the 6th from Chandra Lagna.
Jupiter as sub-lord is fully capable of causing the disease
which he has done. The Sun is Chandra Lagnadhipathi and
occupies the 12th from the major and minor lords. Saturn
was transiting Cancer. As soon as the sub-period of Saturn
commenced, she died. Mark the fact Saturn is lord of the
7th from Moon and is Ayushkaraka. At the time of her
death, Saturn was transiting Leo and Rahu Aries, the 8th
from Janma Rasi.
Chart No. 111.— Born on 26-7-1914 at 5-24 p.m.
(I.S.T.) (Lat. 29° N., Long. 77° 40' E.J
Balance of Venus Dasa at birth : Years 2-3-18.
The native had an attack of IB. in Moon Dasa, Venus
Bhukti, Sun Antara. The major lord Moon, owning the 8th,
is in the 9th in conjunction with Venus the sub-lord who
